title: ISKCON Temple Chennai
tagline: ISKCON Temple Chennai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: ISKCON Temple Chennai, also known as the Sri Sri Radha Krishna Mandir, is a Gaudiya Vaishnavism temple in Chennai, India.
overview.description: ISKCON Temple Chennai, also known as the Sri Sri Radha Krishna Mandir, is a Gaudiya Vaishnavism temple in Chennai, India. The temple is dedicated to the Hindu god Krishna and his consort Radha. It was formally inaugurated on 26 April 2012.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Marine Kingdom
topPlaces.description: Marine Kingdom is an aquarium located along the East Coast Road in Chennai, India. It was opened for public in 2019.

topPlaces.name: VGP Universal Kingdom
topPlaces.description: VGP Universal Kingdom is an amusement park located in East Coast Road in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The park offering small rides during the early days of its history became a full-fledged amusement park in 1997.

topPlaces.name: Injambakkam
topPlaces.description: Injambakkam is a locality in the south of Chennai in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Being a part of the Walajabad block of the district, its panchayat is part of Walajabad panchayat union.

topPlaces.name: Golden Beach, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Golden Beach is a natural urban beach located along the Bay of Bengal in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. VGP Golden Beach is a major tourist attraction in Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Sholinganallur metro station
topPlaces.description: Sholinganallur metro station is an upcoming elevated-interchange metro station on the Red Line and Purple Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This metro station will be among the 19 elevated stations of Corridor III and 39 elevated stations of Corridor V of the Chennai Metro.

topPlaces.name: Karapakkam
topPlaces.description: Karapakkam is an area of Chennai, in Tamil Nadu, India. The Postal PIN Code is 600097.

topPlaces.name: Sholinganallur
topPlaces.description: Sholinganallur, also spelled Solinganalloor or Sozhinganalloor, is a southern suburb of Chennai, India.

topPlaces.name: Okkiam Maduvu
topPlaces.description: Okkiam Maduvu or Okkiyam Maduvu or Oggiyam Maduvu is a 2.8-kilometer-long water channel situated in Kanchipuram district located in southern suburbs of the city of Chennai, India. It gets water from the Pallikaranai Wetland and drains into the Buckingham canal.

items.note: Marine Kingdom is an aquarium located along the East Coast Road in Chennai, India. It was opened for public in 2019.

Karapakkam is an area of Chennai, in Tamil Nadu, India. The Postal PIN Code is 600097.
Sholinganallur, also spelled Solinganalloor or Sozhinganalloor, is a southern suburb of Chennai, India.

Okkiam Maduvu or Okkiyam Maduvu or Oggiyam Maduvu is a 2.8-kilometer-long water channel situated in Kanchipuram district located in southern suburbs of the city of Chennai, India. It gets water from the Pallikaranai Wetland and drains into the Buckingham canal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit ISKCON Temple Chennai?
faq.a: The best time to visit ISKCON Temple Chennai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach ISKCON Temple Chennai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (20 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for ISKCON Temple Chennai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of ISKCON Temple Chennai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in ISKCON Temple Chennai?
faq.a: Stays in ISKCON Temple Chennai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in ISKCON Temple Chennai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Marine Kingdom, VGP Universal Kingdom, Injambakkam, Golden Beach, Chennai, Sholinganallur metro station.
